emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the Sheaffrey's Bar & Townhouse website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 55/100
========================================

6 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- No SSL
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No meta description
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- 10+ inline styles
 HIGH
--------------------
- Broken contact page
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No analytics
 HIGH
--------------------
- Not responsive on mobile


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.label: No SSL
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: Search results show a generic snippet instead of a compelling description.
issues.label: No meta description
issues.check: Search 'site:[business URL]' on Google. Does the snippet look well-written?
issues.siteHint: Meta descriptions directly impact click-through rates from Google by 5-15%.

issues.detail: Large amounts of inline CSS hurt maintainability and caching efficiency.
issues.label: 10+ inline styles
issues.check: View page source and look for multiple <style> blocks with excessive rules.
issues.siteHint: External CSS files compress better and are cached by browsers.

issues.detail: The contact page returns an error or doesn't load properly.
issues.label: Broken contact page
issues.check: Click on the Contact link. Does it load a working page?
issues.siteHint: No working contact page means lost booking inquiries.

issues.detail: Without analytics, you can't track traffic sources, popular pages, or conversion rates.
issues.label: No analytics
issues.check: Install the Tag Assistant extension and check if GA or similar is detected.
issues.siteHint: You can't improve what you don't measure.

issues.label: Not responsive on mobile
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.
